subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, the rightful Sovereign. The heavens with their loftiness and the earth sing His praise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو المالک بالاستحقاق یسبح له السماء برفعتها و الارض
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @chastisement and requital
